heading: RECREATIONAL BOATING SAFETY
label: 131 RECREATIONAL BOATING SAFETY
notes: Historical and Revision NotesThis Chapter establishes the recreational boating safety and facility program administered by the Coast Guard. The general purpose is to encourage State participation in boating safety education and enforcement activities.
